query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A person with short brown hair wearing a dark, horizontally striped shirt is shown in left profile against a solid black background. A smashed red tomato with visible pulp and seeds is pressed against the right side of their face near the eye. Floating in the surrounding darkness to the right are a small round orange citrus fruit, a partly peeled banana with its peel pulled back, and a green bell pepper bearing molded or carved facial features resembling eyes and a mouth.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person wearing a dark striped shirt displays an expression of distress with eyes tightly closed and face contorted as a smashed tomato impacts the side of their face. Floating inexplicably in the surrounding darkness are a small orange, a partly peeled banana, and a green bell pepper with an uncanny humanoid face. The scene fuses visceral discomfort and negative affect with a dreamlike, irrational arrangement of objects suspended in a void, creating a surreal and unsettling atmosphere.
